import os
import sys

os.environ.setdefault("APP_ENV", "production")

import logging

logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO)

from . import models
from . import views
from . import serializers

REGISTRY = {}
REGISTRY["models"] = models
REGISTRY["views"] = views
REGISTRY["serializers"] = serializers

def get_version():
    return "1.0.0"
